item.name: True Scad
item.description:
Let none doubt the trueness of this scad.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Similar in appearance to the false scad, dissections have nonetheless shown this wavekin's internal anatomy is more closely related to an actual scad. Yet despite being turned literally inside out, the truth of this fish's taxonomy remains the subject of endless─and often petty─dispute.
